title: sorghum familiare
intro: Sorghum familiare, also known as broomcorn or sorghum, is a plant species belonging to the grass family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of sorghum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and aid in weight management, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Sorghum can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
